index.TITLE: Qingguang Zheng - Computational Psychology Researcher
index.DESCRIPTION: Qingguang Zheng - Master's candidate in Developmental Psychology at Beijing Normal University (China's #1 Psychology Program). Specializing in computational psychology, advanced NLP applications, and multimodal neuroimaging analysis. Actively seeking PhD opportunities for Fall 2026 admission.

research.TITLE: Research Portfolio - Qingguang Zheng
research.DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive research portfolio showcasing computational psychology projects, NLP applications in mental health research, multimodal neuroimaging studies, and large-scale data analysis. Explore cutting-edge research bridging psychology and artificial intelligence.

skills.TITLE: Technical Skills & Research Expertise - Qingguang Zheng
skills.DESCRIPTION: Technical expertise in Python, R, MATLAB, machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch), advanced statistical methods, neuroimaging analysis tools, and computational research methodologies for psychological science.

personal.TITLE: Personal Interests - Qingguang Zheng
personal.DESCRIPTION: Personal interests, teaching experiences, community involvement, and cultural perspectives that complement my research in computational psychology and contribute to a holistic approach to psychological science.

QAs.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions - Qingguang Zheng
QAs.DESCRIPTION: Comprehensive answers to questions about research motivations, PhD application strategy, future career plans, and insights into my academic journey in computational psychology and interdisciplinary research.

contact.TITLE: Contact Me - Qingguang Zheng
contact.DESCRIPTION: Connect with me for research collaborations, PhD program discussions, or academic partnerships. Multiple contact methods, availability information, and response time commitments for professional communications.
